Column span (cs=N).description: quartable: column span. Merges the next N-1 placeholder cells on the same row (you must write N-1 empty cells immediately after).

Row span (rs=N + ^).description: quartable: row span. Continuation cells in the rows below must be a single `^` (or empty).

Per-cell alignment override.description: quartable: per-cell alignment override (l / c / r or left / center / right).

Vertical line — left of cell (.vl).description: quartable: vertical line on the LEFT boundary of the cell (LaTeX/PDF only).

Vertical line — right of cell (.vr).description: quartable: vertical line on the RIGHT boundary of the cell (LaTeX/PDF only).

Vertical line with limited height (.vr r.description: quartable: vertical line limited to the declaring row plus K-1 rows below (LaTeX/PDF only).

Midrule row (===).description: quartable: full-width horizontal separator. The first cell of the row must be exactly `===`. Fill the remaining cells with empty placeholders.

Cline / partial rule (===N-M).description: quartable: partial horizontal line over columns N..M. Combine ranges and single columns with commas: `===1-2,4-5` or `===2-3,5`.

Quartable filter — front-matter.description: Enable the quartable filter in the document YAML front matter.

Full quartable table skeleton.description: quartable: full table skeleton showcasing colspan, rowspan, midrule and cline.
